title: Enneads IV.3: On the Soul I
description: The soul is not in the body as in a container. Rather, the body is in the soul. The soul contains the body.
introduction: The soul is not in the body as in a container. Rather, the body is in the soul. The soul contains the body.

translation.text: The soul is not in the body; the body is in the soul. The soul extends far beyond the body.
